hints.description: This company is a global leader in credit ratings, providing risk assessments on companies and governments worldwide. They analyze financial health and assign ratings that influence investment decisions, also offering research, data, and analytics to support investors and businesses. Rose Lee, the current CEO, has been instrumental in expanding their ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) offerings.
hints.funFact1: Founded in 1900 by John Moody, the company initially focused on publishing bond ratings in a monthly newsletter called "***** *****". This publication helped standardize the assessment of bond risk and became a crucial tool for investors.
hints.funFact2: In 1975, the company merged with ***** *****, creating a larger and more influential ratings agency. This merger significantly broadened their scope and solidified their position in the financial industry.
